top_signals.title: The Visibility Gap: Why Fleets Can’t Fix What They Can’t See
top_signals.summary:
Fleet maintenance costs are rising fast, and most fleets lack the visibility to manage them strategically. FreightWaves partnered with Kooner Fleet Management Solutions to survey fleet professionals on what’s really driving up costs — and why over 80% still haven’t adopted the AI tools they say would help most.
